Property.Name: CheckExpressionScript
Property.Value: [category]='文化传播' OR [category]='科研调研' OR [category]='企业实习' OR [category]='公益志愿' OR [category]='政务实践' OR [category] IS NULL

Property.Name: BodyScript
Property.Value:
BEGIN SET NOCOUNT ON;
SELECT DISTINCT TOP (@limit) a.project_id, a.activity_id, a.title, a.org_name, a.province, a.city, a.district, a.category, a.start_date, a.end_date, a.quota, a.source_url, a.crawled_at FROM activities a WHERE a.is_active = 1 AND (@province IS NULL OR a.province = @province) AND (@city IS NULL OR a.city = @city) AND (@district IS NULL OR a.district = @district) AND (@category IS NULL OR a.category = @category) AND (@major_tag IS NULL OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM activity_tags t2 WHERE t2.project_id = a.project_id AND t2.tag_type = 'major' AND t2.tag_value = @major_tag )) AND (@skill_tag IS NULL OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM activity_tags t3 WHERE t3.project_id = a.project_id AND t3.tag_type = 'skill' AND t3.tag_value = @skill_tag )) ORDER BY a.crawled_at DESC; END

Property.Name: HeaderContents
QueryScript
Property.Value: SELECT a.project_id, a.activity_id, a.title, a.org_name, a.province, a.city, a.district, a.category, a.start_date, a.end_date, a.quota, a.source_url, d.registration_start, d.registration_end, d.description, d.requirements, d.org_description, d.benefits, d.attachment_name, d.attachment_url, d.contact_person, d.contact_phone, STUFF(( SELECT ',' + t.tag_value FROM activity_tags t WHERE t.project_id = a.project_id AND t.tag_type = 'major' FOR XML PATH(''), TYPE ).value('.', 'NVARCHAR(MAX)'), 1, 1, '') AS major_tags, STUFF(( SELECT ',' + t.tag_value FROM activity_tags t WHERE t.project_id = a.project_id AND t.tag_type = 'skill' FOR XML PATH(''), TYPE ).value('.', 'NVARCHAR(MAX)'), 1, 1, '') AS skill_tags FROM activities a LEFT JOIN activity_details d ON a.project_id = d.project_id WHERE a.is_active = 1

Property.Name: HeaderContents
Property.Value: -- ========================================== -- 8. 创建视图 (v_activity_full) -- 用途：将主表、详情表、标签表聚合，方便前端或大模型一次性获取完整活动信息 -- ========================================== CREATE VIEW v_activity_full AS
